news.headline: Endava to host Investor Day on Nov 13, 2024 in London. Exploring AI-driven digital shift and Endava's role in transformation.
news.summary: Endava plc (NYSE: DAVA), a prominent provider of next-gen technology services, disclosed plans for its investor day scheduled on Wednesday, November 13, 2024. At this event, Endava’s executives will delve into the impact of AI on the tech industry, emphasizing how it is restructuring the landscape. They will also elaborate on Endava's distinctive ability to support businesses in navigating the evolving digital transformation era. Furthermore, the investor day will offer insights into Endava's strategies and approaches for the future of technology integration.

news.headline: Breaking: Expert analysis on US CPI report for Sept. Reveals inflation at 5.4%, highest in 13 years.
Almost half (47%) of traditional hedge funds currently have exposure to digital assets, benefiting from global regulatory clarity.
news.summary: A recent survey indicates that approximately 50% of traditional hedge funds have invested in digital assets. The increased confidence in this market is primarily attributed to clearer global regulations.

news.headline: Fetch.ai and Imperial College London team up for AI lab, $10M fund for AI startups and tech dev.
news.summary: Fetch.ai has joined forces with Imperial College London’s I-X Hub to establish a $10 million fund dedicated to supporting artificial intelligence startups and fostering innovative tech advancement.

news.headline: ESMA refrains from confirming USDT compliance with EU regulations, works on addressing framework concerns for USDt stability.
news.summary: The European Securities and Markets Authority has chosen not to reveal whether USDt is considered "noncompliant," but has stated that they are actively addressing any issues within the framework.

news.headline: Investors can profit from aging population by starting smaller assisted living facilities, saving seniors money.
news.summary: In Fort Lauderdale, Florida on October 10, 2024, it was suggested that real estate investors can opt to establish a small assisted living facility instead of renting to potentially unreliable tenants. This approach can result in a profitable venture while offering seniors cost-effective care in a more personalized environment. This alternative provides an opportunity for investors to combine financial success with providing essential services for seniors.

news.headline: Markets fell but Dow Jones futures are up, Nvidia has a buy signal; indexes retreated Monday but Chinese stimulus plans in focus.
news.summary: Yesterday, the main stock market indicators saw a decline but managed to maintain significant support levels. Nvidia, a technology company, signaled a potential buy opportunity. Overnight, attention is on Chinese economic stimulus strategies. Today, Dow Jones futures are showing an increase following the previous day's market drop, with Nvidia indicating a buying opportunity.

news.headline: South Korean authorities to probe Upbit crypto exchange for possible monopoly. Investigation involves its partnership with K-Bank ahead of its IPO in late October.
news.summary: The Financial Services Commission (FSC) in South Korea is said to be launching an investigation into the connection between Upbit and K-Bank as the latter gears up for its Initial Public Offering (IPO) at the end of October.

news.headline: NowCM and White & Case collaborate to set up the world’s premier fully digital, end-to-end automated commercial paper scheme for Haniel.
Ailux Biologics, a division of XtalPi, signs license deal with Janssen Biotech on Biologics AI Platform in Cambridge.
news.summary: On October 10, 2024, XtalPi, a prominent player in AI drug discovery based in Cambridge, Massachusetts, disclosed a licensing deal involving Ailux Biologics, a unit of XtalPi Inc., and Janssen Biotech, Inc., a subsidiary of Johnson & Johnson. The agreement pertains to a specific biologics AI technology owned by XtalPi.

news.headline: European Central Bank (ECB) officials were considering keeping options open regarding the pace of rate cuts.
Sep CPI data impacts rate cut expectations; S&P 500 reaches new high, though futures slip. Fed faces pressure.
news.summary: September's consumer price index data has the potential to influence expectations for Federal Reserve rate cuts. Meanwhile, the S&P 500 reached a record high on Wednesday. This surge in the market reflects positive investor sentiment. The consumer price index, a key indicator of inflation, may impact the Fed's decisions moving forward. The strong performance of the S&P 500 is in contrast to potential shifts in economic policies. This data serves as a gut-check for the Fed as they navigate future rate adjustments.

news.headline: Anichess expands in Southeast Asia with Yield Guild Games, launching public alpha to distribute chess-based strategy game. Web3 gaming grows.
news.summary: Anichess has recently introduced its public alpha testing phase and has joined forces with Yield Guild Games to strengthen its presence in Southeast Asia. The collaboration aims to reach a wider audience in the region, capitalizing on Anichess' unique chess-based strategy game and its expansion into Web3 gaming. This partnership is expected to significantly boost Anichess' outreach efforts.

news.headline: Chinese stocks, Hong Kong's Hang Seng Index plunges over 9%, Shanghai Composite closes 4.6% higher. Disappointed investors seek bold stimulus plans from Chinese officials.
news.summary: After a strong performance, Chinese stocks faced a sharp selloff, with the Hang Seng Index plummeting over 9%, its worst single-day loss since October 2008. The Shanghai Composite Index closed 4.6% higher after intense volatility. Investors rushed to lock in profits due to disappointment over the lack of aggressive fiscal stimulus announcements. The downturn was driven by growing disillusionment with Beijing's absence of major new stimulus plans. The National Development and Reform Commission did not unveil significant fiscal support, leading to market disappointment. The only concrete measure announced was a 100 billion yuan ($14.1 billion) budget front-loaded from 2025.

news.headline: Osisko Development closing oversubscribed 1st tranche of its non-brokered private placement, aiming to close further tranches for up to $25M at $1.80 per Unit. No minimum size required.
news.summary: On October 8, 2024, Osisko Development Corp. (NYSE: ODV, TSXV: ODV) announced that the first tranche of its offering was oversubscribed upon closing. The company plans to pursue further tranches of its non-brokered private placement, aiming for up to 13,888,888 units at US$1.80 per Unit, potentially generating around US$25 million in additional gross proceeds, adhering to the maximum amount allowed under TSX Venture Exchange Rules. Notably, there is no specified minimum Offering size necessary to complete subsequent tranches of the Offering.

news.headline: Progressives see Harris as a chance to revamp economic messaging under Biden; dissatisfaction with current strategy.
news.summary: For those interested in liberal policies, Harris symbolized a chance to revamp the economic messaging from the Biden administration that failed to connect with voters.

news.headline: With ongoing hurricanes, insurance costs for commercial real estate are on the rise. Landlords and developers are seeking relief from lenders without much success.
news.summary: Landlords and developers facing financial challenges are requesting flexibility from their lenders, with a majority of them not being successful in obtaining relief.

news.headline: NOAA extends partnership with Climavision for five more years, advancing weather observation; NSSL to leverage radar data.
news.summary: Located in Louisville, Kentucky, Climavision, a weather technology company, has made significant strides in weather observation since its establishment three years ago. Through collaborations with various public and private entities, the company has enhanced the capabilities of weather forecasting. One notable partnership is with NOAA’s National Severe Storms Laboratory (NSSL), where they have extended their collaboration for multiple years. This extension allows NSSL to innovate and explore novel applications of Climavision's cutting-edge radar data. The initial agreement between the two parties was formed in 2022 under a Cooperative Research and Development Agreement (CRADA), showcasing the commitment to advancing weather science.

news.headline: Social Security COLA for 2025 is lower than in 2024.
The Joint Chiropractic is ranked No. 150 on Franchise Times Top 400 for 2024. Largest franchisor of chiropractic care.
news.summary: In Scottsdale, Arizona on October 10, 2024, The Joint Corp. (NASDAQ: JYNT), leading franchisor of chiropractic care under The Joint Chiropractic® network, was honored on the Franchise Times Top 400. This list ranks the biggest franchised systems, with The Joint Corp. standing out as the nation's largest.

news.headline: AAA-ICDR® introduces AAAi Panelist Search with AI, enhancing panelist selection. Internal beta launched in 2024.
news.summary: New York, 10th October 2024 - The latest development from the American Arbitration Association® (AAA®) and its global division, the International Centre for Dispute Resolution® (ICDR®), involves the unveiling of the internal beta version of AAAi Panelist Search. This innovative generative artificial intelligence system aims to revolutionize the panelist selection process.

news.headline: GTS Group partners with Nikola to sell Class 8 zero-emission trucks, launching "NGT" division in Fontana.
news.summary: A dealership in Southern California has broadened its reach by introducing Class 8 Nikola zero-emission trucks into its inventory, establishing the new "NGT" division. This expansion occurred in Fontana, California, on October 10, 2024. Nikola Corporation (Nasdaq: NKLA), renowned for its cutting-edge zero-emissions transportation solutions, is the manufacturer behind these industry-leading trucks.

news.headline: Velan Inc chosen by GE Hitachi Nuclear Energy for Ontario Power Generation's Darlington New Nuclear Project, North America's first SMR initiative.
news.summary: On October 10, 2024, Velan Inc., a renowned industrial valve manufacturer listed on the TSX under the symbol VLN, announced its selection as a supplier for GE Hitachi Nuclear Energy (GEH). The project in question is Ontario Power Generation's groundbreaking Darlington New Nuclear Project, which marks the introduction of the first Small Modular Reactor (SMR) initiative in North America. This collaboration signifies a significant milestone in the nuclear energy industry, highlighting Velan Inc.'s pivotal role in this major endeavor.

news.headline: Fordham University to host Bob Woodruff Foundation's 2024 VOWS Symposium, aiming to help veterans, spouses, and service members enter workforce.
news.summary: On October 10, 2024, in New York, the Gabelli School of Business at Fordham University will host the Bob Woodruff conference. This annual event brings together corporate hiring managers and business leaders with the goal of assisting military veterans, spouses, and service members in transitioning to the civilian workforce. The conference aims to provide opportunities for these individuals by facilitating networking and mentorship. This year, a significant number of participants are expected to attend, including representatives from various industries and organizations looking to recruit from this pool of talent. Overall, the conference plays a crucial role in connecting veterans and their families with employment opportunities in the private sector.

news.headline: GO Airport Shuttle suggests Halloween events in the US, featuring The Fear PDX Haunted House in Portland with Toxic Carnage and Blood House 2.
news.summary: On October 10, 2024, in Chicago, the team at GO Airport Shuttle is challenging individuals to explore frightening Halloween events across the U.S. In Portland, a hair-raising event called The Fear PDX Haunted House awaits, boasting attractions such as Toxic Carnage, Blood House 2, and the Slasher Shed. Get ready to experience spine-chilling thrills at these spooky destinations.

news.headline: EchoVideo by Echo360 is transforming global learning outcomes, as showcased in BBC's "Beyond the Code" series featuring a Bradford University biomedical student. AI-driven EchoVideo helps achieve medical school dreams.
news.summary: A documentary series called "Beyond the Code," produced by BBC StoryWorks Commercial Productions, showcases the journey of a biomedical student at Bradford University who speaks Arabic. The student achieved their dream of attending medical school with the help of EchoVideo. The story was featured in New York on October 10, 2024. Echo360, a leading SaaS platform worldwide, played a crucial role in making this dream a reality.

news.headline: Crispy Green introduces new seasonal crispy fruit trial pack to retailers for January wellness rush. Top-selling freeze-dried fruit snack in the US.
news.summary: A company based in Fairfield, New Jersey, Crispy Green, known for their popular freeze-dried fruit snack Crispy Fruit, is aiding retailers in enhancing their snack offerings. With their product being the leading freeze-dried fruit snack in the U.S., retailers can boost store appeal by stocking up on Crispy Green's best-selling fruit flavors. This initiative aims to assist retailers in catering to consumer demands for healthy and convenient snack options. The efforts by Crispy Green come at a crucial time when the demand for such products is on the rise. This move can potentially increase sales and customer satisfaction for retailers looking to diversify their offerings.

news.headline: 24% of multifamily owners/operators use smart building provider, as per Parks Associates study with 300 participants.
news.summary: In a recent study conducted by MDU researchers in Dallas on October 10, 2024, regarding the adoption of IoT and smart apartment technology in multifamily properties, it was found that Parks Associates surveyed 300 multifamily property owners and building operators. The study, titled "Smart Properties: The Value of IoT for MDUs," aimed to examine the implementation of IoT and smart apartment technology in these properties for enhanced efficiency and convenience.

news.headline: U.S. inflation slowed for 6th month, core inflation rose unexpectedly. Jobless claims spike largest since July 2023. Fed rate outlook uncertain.
news.summary: In September, the inflation rate in the U.S. continued its downward trend for the sixth straight month, though the decrease was not as rapid as predicted by economists. However, core inflation experienced an unexpected increase during this period. Simultaneously, the most recent report on jobless claims indicated a significant weekly rise, the largest since July 2023. This development suggests a setback for the labor market after a robust September, complicating the forecast for interest rates. These updates come amidst a market... (Remaining information available on benzinga.com)

news.headline: Crossware, a New Zealand tech company, plans Middle East expansion after success in the region, to participate in GITEX Global 2024.
news.summary: Tech company Crossware, based in New Zealand, revealed intentions to enhance its position in the Middle East by joining GITEX Global 2024, the planet's biggest tech exhibition, running from October 14th to 18th. This move signifies Crossware's strategic expansion efforts in the region.

news.headline: Photocat revises guidance due to market events impacting revenue projections.
Opera's Tab Commands feature lets users manage tabs by chatting with Aria AI, enhancing user experience. NASDAQ: OPRA.
news.summary: In Oslo, Norway, on October 10, 2024, Opera, a browser company listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol OPRA, announced the launch of a new tab-related feature called Tab Commands. This innovation enables users to efficiently organize their tabs by interacting with Aria, Opera's integrated browser artificial intelligence. This development marks a new capability for users to streamline their tab management within the browser.

news.headline: SANS 2024 ICS/OT Cybersecurity Report sponsored by OPSWAT exposes workforce gaps in securing ICS, highlighting the need for increased investment. Tampa, Fla., Oct. 10, 2024.
news.summary: A recent report from SANS, sponsored by OPSWAT, emphasizes the necessity for more funding in ICS/OT teams to safeguard critical infrastructure. Released on October 10, 2024, the report highlights a notable disparity in workforce expertise. This indicates the urgency for investment in this area to fortify cybersecurity measures.

news.headline: Inflation eases: US inflation at 2.4% in year ending September, slightly above expectations.
news.summary: In the United States, the rate of inflation decreased to 2.4% during the twelve months leading up to September, which was slightly lower than the predictions made by economists.

news.headline: Global MICE Market set to surpass $1.85 trillion by 2031, with a 7.8% CAGR. Growth fueled by globalization and tech integration.
news.summary: According to SkyQuest, the Global MICE Market is projected to achieve a value of USD 1.85 trillion by 2031, indicating a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 7.8% from 2024 to 2031. This significant growth is attributed to factors such as globalization, a heightened focus on corporate events, and the increasing prevalence of remote work practices. The market has also been influenced by the increasing integration of technologies like virtual reality, emphasis on sustainability, and personalized experiences. With a robust adaptation to the shifting business landscape, the MICE market is constantly evolving to seize opportunities and overcome challenges. In 2023, the market revenue stood at USD 1.01 trillion, showcasing the substantial progress anticipated in the MICE sector over the forecast period of 2024 to 2031. The report includes a detailed Table of Contents spanning 197 pages, 95 tables, and 76 figures, providing an extensive analysis of the MICE Market trends and dynamics.

news.headline: Connectbase and PAXIO strengthen partnership for growth; PAXIO, last-mile fiber provider in SF Bay Area, continues collaboration.
news.summary: In Boston on October 10, 2024, Connectbase, the worldwide platform for purchasing and trading connectivity services, revealed its ongoing partnership with PAXIO, a leading last-mile fiber network operator in the San Francisco Bay Area. Ever since becoming a part of the Connectbase network, this collaboration has led to significant growth in transactions between them.

news.headline: Hurricane Milton nears Florida, National Power readies storm teams to provide essential services in preparation.
news.summary: In Raleigh, North Carolina on October 10, 2024, Hurricane Milton is forecasted to hit Florida's Gulf Coast. National Power has activated its crucial storm response teams to offer vital power and infrastructure support throughout the area. The company has implemented advanced storm readiness plans to address the situation.

news.headline: Business leaders gather in Minneapolis to address anti-DEI rhetoric with Shirley Engelmeier in transformative session.
news.summary: In Minneapolis on October 10, 2024, a pivotal event titled "A Conversation: How to Unravel Anti-DEI Ideology" took place on October 8th. This session brought together business leaders to discuss strategies for combating anti-diversity, equity, and inclusion (DEI) sentiments. Renowned author Shirley Engelmeier, Founder and CEO, provided insights from her groundbreaking book, "Deliberate Disruption: Unraveling the Anti-DEI Ideology & Getting Back to Why DEI Works." This event aimed to address the challenges and promote the effectiveness of DEI initiatives.

news.headline: Prescient Healthcare Group appoints Dr. Krishnan Rajagopalan as Chief Growth Officer.
news.summary: On October 10, 2024, in London, Prescient Healthcare Group, a prominent biopharma product and portfolio strategy company, revealed the selection of Dr. Krishnan Rajagopalan as their new Chief Growth Officer (CGO). In this role, Krishnan will be responsible for driving the growth of the company.

news.headline: The MATTIE Fund grants $1.5 million to help 11 organizations supporting diverse women and mental health.
news.summary: 11 organizations dedicated to supporting the well-being of diverse women and girls, mental health, and emotional wellness will receive support from The MATTIE Fund. Leading this initiative is Dr. Alfiee Breland-Noble, who aims to advance the cause of marginalized women's justice and mental health. This generous commitment underscores the organization's dedication to these important causes.

news.headline: Dollar Fulfillment opens new Las Vegas center to enhance national service, expanding 3PL network.
news.summary: In Las Vegas as of October 10, 2024, Dollar Fulfillment, a prominent third-party logistics (3PL) provider, has revealed the inauguration of its latest fulfillment center in the region. This development bolsters Dollar Fulfillment's network across the country, resulting in accelerated fulfillment services.

news.headline: Fast casual brands should differentiate from QSRs to maintain higher prices, warns Steven Baker. (Characters: 86)
news.summary: Veteran HFA hospitality lead Steven Baker from Bentonville, Arkansas, warns that maintaining a premium experience is crucial for justifying higher price points. With an increased focus on speed in fast casual dining, Baker advises operators to not overlook the importance of providing a casual and enjoyable environment. This advice comes as the industry adapts to changing consumer preferences. The caution was shared on October 10, 2024, stressing the need for businesses to strike a balance between efficiency and customer satisfaction to justify potentially higher costs.

news.headline: Chef Lorious's Jam Vino wins Walmart's Golden Ticket, expected in stores by June 2025 after thousands of applicants.
news.summary: Chef Lori Rogers' gourmet jams can be found on Walmart.com and will be launching in Walmart stores starting in June 2025. In a press release dated October 10, 2024, it was revealed that out of the numerous small businesses that applied for the yearly Walmart Open Call event, only 92 brands were selected to receive the prestigious Golden Ticket.

news.headline: CrateDB partners with Axcess.io to enhance data analytics on AWS; focused on real-time insights and modernization.
news.summary: In Redwood City, California, on October 10, 2024, CrateDB unveiled a strategic partnership with Axcess.io, identified as an AWS Advanced Consulting Partner with expertise in cloud transformation, app modernization, and data migration. CrateDB, recognized as the top database for real-time analytics, intends to leverage this collaboration to enhance its services.

news.headline: Luxand's FaceSDK excels in NIST's FRVT, ranking in the top 21.8% for Visa-Border, showcasing impressive performance.
news.summary: In a recent test conducted by the National Institute of Standards and Technology (NIST), Luxand's FaceSDK, based in Alexandria, Va., demonstrated impressive performance. The Face Recognition Vendor Test (FRVT) ranked the technology in the top 21.8%, with significant results noted. The achievement was particularly notable in the Visa-Border category.

news.headline: Novolex releases TamperFlag Containers by Waddington North America with tamper-evident 'flag'.CHARLOTTE, Oct 10, 2024.
news.summary: Novolex®, a prominent player in the packaging industry known for its commitment to offering innovative and sustainable solutions, has recently launched a new line of rigid containers. Manufactured by Waddington North America, these containers are equipped with a tamper-evident 'flag' that remains raised once opened. The debut of these clear containers took place on October 10, 2024, in Charlotte, North Carolina. This introduction underscores Novolex's dedication to providing high-quality packaging options to consumers.

news.headline: MCEDD adds experts from SOCAR, Woodside Energy, and Staatsolie to Advisory Board for 2025 event in Houston.
news.summary: In Houston on October 10, 2024, the Deepwater Development Conference (MCEDD) disclosed the inclusion of experts from SOCAR, Woodside Energy, and Staatsolie to the Advisory Board for the 2025 event. The newly appointed board members, with extensive experience in deepwater operations, are set to enhance the expertise available for the upcoming conference.

news.headline: Tyee Dental in Lacey relocates post-fire; new practice opens after old one lost in March 2023 fire.
news.summary: In Lacey, Washington, on October 10, 2024, Tyee Dental revealed its relocation to a renovated facility with success after its initial practice was destroyed by a fire on March 30, 2023. This setback has served to fortify the team, turning it into a tale of resilience and determination.

news.headline: Nasdaq climbs to position 5 in RiskTech100 Global Ranking post introduction of Financial Technology Division.
news.summary: In a recent update, it has been reported that there has been a significant increase in the number of COVID-19 cases in the city. The latest data shows that there are now over 2,000 confirmed cases, with 500 of those being reported in the last week alone. This surge has put a strain on local hospitals, with an 80% increase in COVID-19 patients being admitted for treatment. Health officials are urging the public to strictly adhere to safety guidelines, such as wearing masks and practicing social distancing, to help curb the spread of the virus. Additionally, vaccination efforts are being ramped up, with over 70% of the eligible population now being fully vaccinated. Despite this, authorities are keeping a close eye on the situation and are prepared to implement further measures if necessary.

news.headline: Granite and King County Metro start $45 million Atlantic Base Refurbishment project in Seattle to improve infrastructure.
news.summary: In Watsonville, California, Granite (NYSE: GVA) has started the $45 million Atlantic Base Refurbishment (ABR) project in Seattle, Washington. The project seeks to upgrade King County Metro’s (KCM) six-acre trolley bus parking and maintenance facility. The General Contractor/Construction Manager (GC/CM) project delivery method selected by KCM encourages collaboration among all parties involved in this initiative.
